scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('src/data',{recursive:true})" && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('public/geojson/eng/England.geojson','src/data/england.json')" && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('public/geojson/wal/wales.geojson','src/data/wales.json')" && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:wordpress: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('src/data',{recursive:true})" && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('public/geojson/eng/England.geojson','src/data/england.json')" && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('public/geojson/wal/wales.geojson','src/data/wales.json')" && tsc -b && vite build --config vite.wordpress.config.ts
